mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member( mnum, id, pwd, name, nick, email, verified, mphone, grade, storecode, storeaddr, logintype, authority, regdate ) VALUES member_seq.nextval, #{mnum}, #{id}, #{pwd}, #{name}, #{nick}, #{email}, #{mphone}, #{storecode}, #{storeaddr}, #{logintype}, #{authority},sysdate)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM member WHERE nick = #{nick}
